headline: Fastboy Payments Connects BambooPay Gateway to Cybersource Platform, a Visa Acceptance Solution
summary: Fastboy Payments announced it is working with Cybersource to make BambooPay Gateway available on Cybersource Platform, providing merchants streamlined access to digital commerce and fraud management capabilities through a single integration.

headline: Visa's Ingenico Tie-Up: Expanding Beyond the Payment Layer
summary: V deepens its commerce push with Ingenico, integrating POS and payments to unify online-offline experiences and expand beyond transaction processing.

raw.headline: Visa's Ingenico Tie-Up: Expanding Beyond the Payment Layer

headline: BofA Teams with Visa to Offer Cardholders a Chance to Win a Trip to the FIFA World Cup 2026™
summary: Bank of America, the Official Bank Sponsor of FIFA World Cup 2026™, in partnership with Visa®, the Official Payment Provider of FIFA World Cup 2026™, today announced a sweepstakes for Bank of America Consumer and Small Business Visa® cardholders that provides an opportunity to win one of three hospitality packages to FIFA World Cup 2026™ knockout round matches, simply by making everyday purchases with their eligible credit card.

headline: Dell, Weyerhaeuser, Visa: A Cross-Sector Look at Former Stock Picks
summary: Dell Technologies  was introduced by Jacob Sonenshine in October.  Weyerhaeuser  was covered by Andrew Bary in December.  Dell is showing relative strength in 2026, up 21% while the benchmark  is down 3%.
